default.title: Three things, one canvas.
default.description: Edit the keys in feature-grid.data.json to see per-variant data flow into each artboard.

Fast.title: Live re-render under a second.
Fast.description: Save a .jsx file and the artboard re-renders before you can flick to the browser. Vite HMR under the hood.

Open.title: Designs you can git diff.
Open.description: Every asset is plain React. Your repo, your folder structure, your editor. No vendor format, no cloud.

Yours.title: Edit with the editor you love.
Yours.description: VS Code, Cursor, vim — whatever you already use. Lerret stays out of the editing path. The canvas just renders.
